pages.text: The Nether Reactor Core is a mysterious device that contains powerful Nether energy, which can be used to summon a loyal Wither servant. Only those who understand past events can craft the Nether Reactor Core.

The method of summoning a Wither servant is similar to the usual way of summoning a Wither, but the core steps are different: First, arrange soul sand and the Nether Reactor Core in a T-shaped structure, with the Nether Reactor Core in the center and three pieces of soul sand around it. Then place three Wither Skeleton skulls at the top. Finally, right-click the central Nether Reactor Core to awaken a Wither servant under your control.
